description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push, pull request, tag creation, and a weekly schedule. The workflow has three jobs: build-ubuntu, build-osx, and build-windows. Each job checks out the repository, installs dependencies, generates a project with CMake, builds, and tests it. The build-ubuntu job runs on ubuntu-18.04 and ubuntu-20.04 with a matrix strategy, build-osx on macos-latest, and build-windows on windows-latest with a matrix strategy for 32-bit and 64-bit builds.
